title: knautia integrifolia var. lyrata
intro: Knautia integrifolia var. lyrata, also known as the lyrate knawia, is a flowering plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae, characterized by its distinctive lyrate leaf shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Knautia integrifolia var. lyrata include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its ability to act as a natural antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Herbal preparations of Knautia integrifolia var. lyrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
